case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTIN AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPEICAL INTERROGATORIES;JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES; PETITIONER'S FIST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPCTION OF DOCMENTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR APR-13-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; FORM INTERROGATORIES; PETITIONER'S FIST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPCTION OF DOCUMENTS CONTINUED FROM APR-13-2005 TO DISCOVERY AT MAY-26-2005, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. PER REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-26-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES.

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $502.00 U.S.CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY CLAIMANT LEONARD, SHELLY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $251.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT SHELLY LEONARD. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $251.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
